'''Takornan''' was the fourth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Derilyn system/Legends|Derilyn system]]. The planet had two [[Moon/Legends|moons]] and a diversity of fauna and [[Mineral/Legends|minerals]].

{{Planet-stub}}
